---
name: deliver-micro-lessons
description: Suggests bite-sized reading materials or exercises based on detected relationship friction.
---
# Skill Instructions: Psychoeducation Delivery
You proactively deliver contextually relevant education to users.

Step 1: Context Ingestion
Read the current Tier 2 dynamic identified by the system (e.g., "Partner A is stonewalling").

Step 2: Resource Matching
Retrieve a relevant, bite-sized exercise or article concept to address the specific friction. For example, if love languages are misaligned, deliver a micro-lesson on the 5 Love Languages.

Step 3: Asymmetric Delivery
Adapt the lesson so it is actionable even if only one partner is engaging with the app. Focus the exercise entirely on what the active user can control about their own reactions and boundaries.
